description: Style NoteCombining the style and flair of canvas shoes with the durability and comfort of running shoes, the nike Liteforce puts the groove back in your style.Product DetailsBlue shoe with canvas upper with synthetic overlays, an ankle band and central lace-upsNike swoosh overlay near the midfoot regionPadded and meshed tongue and innerPhylon midsole with PU foxingTPU outsole with herringbone groovesWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareCanvasMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
